CustomField.description: This formula checks if the onboarding was created before 06/26/2024, if the related payer customer type is "Government Payer," or if the account customer type is "Multi-Site Child." If any of these are true, it displays "Outside Sync Need Population," indicating the onboarding and school object shouldn't match due to other specific scenarios. Otherwise, it compares specific new SaaS-related date fields and returns True if both fields are null or if the date difference is one day or less, and False otherwise.
CustomField.formula: IF( OR( DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) < DATE(2024, 6, 26), Account__r.Related_Payer_Customer_Type__c = "Government Payer", TEXT( Account__r.Customer_Type__c ) = "Multi-Site Child" ), "Outside Sync Need Population", IF( AND( OR( AND( ISBLANK(SaaS_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c), ISBLANK(Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c) ), ABS(DATEVALUE(SaaS_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c) - DATEVALUE(Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c)) <= 1 ), OR( AND( ISBLANK(SaaS_Adding_Parents_Stage_Met_Date__c), ISBLANK(Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Adding_Parents_Stage_Met_Date__c) ), ABS(DATEVALUE(SaaS_Adding_Parents_Stage_Met_Date__c) - DATEVALUE(Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Adding_Parents_Stage_Met_Date__c)) <= 1 ), OR( AND( ISBLANK(SaaS_Adding_Staff_Stage_Met_Date__c), ISBLANK(Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Adding_Staff_Stage_Met_Date__c) ), ABS(DATEVALUE(SaaS_Adding_Staff_Stage_Met_Date__c) - DATEVALUE(Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Adding_Staff_Stage_Met_Date__c)) <= 1 ), OR( AND( ISBLANK(SaaS_Staff_Logging_In_Stage_Met_Date__c), ISBLANK(Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Staff_Logging_In_Stage_Met_Date__c) ), ABS(DATEVALUE(SaaS_Staff_Logging_In_Stage_Met_Date__c) - DATEVALUE(Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Staff_Logging_In_Stage_Met_Date__c)) <= 1 ), OR( AND( ISBLANK(SaaS_Parents_Signing_Up_Stage_Met_Date__c), ISBLANK(Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Parents_Signing_Up_Stage_Met_Date__c) ), ABS(DATEVALUE(SaaS_Parents_Signing_Up_Stage_Met_Date__c) - DATEVALUE(Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Parents_Signing_Up_Stage_Met_Date__c)) <= 1 ), OR( AND( ISBLANK(SaaS_Tracking_Attendance_Stage_Met_Date__c), ISBLANK(Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Tracking_Attendance_Stage_Met_Date__c) ), ABS(DATEVALUE(SaaS_Tracking_Attendance_Stage_Met_Date__c) - DATEVALUE(Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Tracking_Attendance_Stage_Met_Date__c)) <= 1 ), OR( AND( ISBLANK(SaaS_Logging_Activities_Stage_Met_Date__c), ISBLANK(Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Logging_Activities_Stage_Met_Date__c) ), ABS(DATEVALUE(SaaS_Logging_Activities_Stage_Met_Date__c) - DATEVALUE(Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Logging_Activities_Stage_Met_Date__c)) <= 1 ), OR( AND( ISBLANK(SaaS_Activation_Date_Stamp__c), ISBLANK(Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Activation_Date_2024__c) ), ABS(SaaS_Activation_Date_Stamp__c - DATEVALUE(Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Activation_Date_2024__c)) <= 1 ) ), "True", "False" ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Compares SaaS dates between onboarding and the school object. If onboarding was created before 06/26/2024, or certain account conditions apply, it shows "Outside Sync Need Population." Otherwise, it checks if dates match or differ by one day or less.
CustomField.label: New SaaS OB/School In Sync?
